no_results.title: Bu'aan gaaffii kee wajjin walsimu hin argamne
no_results.subtitle: Bu'aawwan walfakkaatan tokko tokko armaan gaditti dhiyeessineerra
no_results.alt_subtitle: Gaaffii ykn calaqqee adda ta'e yaali
no_results.need_help: Gargaarsa barbaadduu? Namoota cinaa dhaabbatan qabna.

ai_broadened_results_alert: Gaaffiin keessan bal'inaan waan barbaaduuf bu'aa bal'aa agarsiifne. Mata duree ykn yaada fayyadamuun fooyyessuu dandeessa.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_info: Barbaacha keessan bal'inaan waan barbaaduuf bu'aa bal'aa agarsiifne. Mata duree ykn yaada fayyadamuun fooyyessuu dandeessa.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_confidenc: Tapha gaarii ta'e irratti ofitti amanamummaa waan hin qabneef bu'aa bal'aa agarsiifne. Mata duree ykn yaada fayyadamuun fooyyessuu dandeessa.
